title: Team Unit and Matchup Parameters
description: Parameters for team unit selection and matchup opponent filtering

_source_reference.note: This schema documents parameters defined in the source file. The source file remains the authoritative implementation.

team_attribution.description: Which team a player-cell team RATE stat (per_game / per_team_play) attaches to. 'historical' (default) uses the per-year team of record via the player_year -> team_year bridge; 'current' uses player.current_nfl_team. Honored only for team_stats_from_plays rate columns. See ./../values/team-attribution.json for full value semantics, edge cases, and the deferred counting-column extension.
